mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance_record (schedule_id, course_id, class_id, student_id, attendance_date, sign_in_time, sign_out_time, sign_in_location, sign_out_location, status, source) VALUES (#{scheduleId}, #{courseId}, #{classId}, #{studentId}, #{attendanceDate}, #{signInTime}, #{signOutTime}, #{signInLocation}, #{signOutLocation}, #{status}, #{source})
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance_record SET status = #{status}, sign_in_time = #{signInTime}, sign_out_time = #{signOutTime}, sign_in_location = #{signInLocation}, sign_out_location = #{signOutLocation} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ar.id, ci.course_name AS courseName, cl.class_name AS className, ar.attendance_date AS attendanceDate, ar.sign_in_time AS signInTime, ar.sign_out_time AS signOutTime, ar.status AS status FROM attendance_record ar LEFT JOIN course_info ci ON ci.id = ar.course_id LEFT JOIN class_info cl ON cl.id = ar.class_id WHERE ar.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY ar.attendance_date DESC, ar.id DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'PRESENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS present_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'LATE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'ABSENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS absent_count, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'PRESENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS present_rate FROM attendance_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM attendance_record ar JOIN course_info ci ON ci.id = ar.course_id WHERE ar.id = #{recordId} AND ci.teacher_id = #{teacherId}
